text:
Once upon a time, in a lush, verdant forest, there was a magical tree that was known to be the heart of the woods. This tree was not just any ordinary tree; it was a talking tree that could grant wishes. However, its magic was guarded by a beautiful and gentle white unicorn who lived in the tree's shadow.

The unicorn's name was Luminara, and she had a soft mane that shimmered like moonlight. The forest creatures would gather around her every night, listening to her soothing voice as she sang lullabies and told stories of far-off lands. Her hooves would gently caress the bark of the wishing tree, ensuring its magic remained strong.

One day, a curious young kitten named Paws wandered into the forest. Paws was small and fluffy, with big green eyes that sparkled with curiosity. She had never seen such a beautiful creature as Luminara or heard such enchanting music as her songs.
